question.p:
Item 1 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Actinic keratosis Associated Pathology: Often precedes squamous cell carcinoma

Item 2 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Addison's Associated Pathology: Autoimmune (infection is the second most common cause)

Item 3 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Albumino-cytologic dissociation Associated Pathology: Guillain-Barre (increased protein in CSF with only modest increase in cell count)

Item 4 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Aneurysm, dissecting Associated Pathology: HTN

Item 5 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-basement membrane Associated Pathology: Goodpasture's syndrome

Item 6 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-centromere antibodies Associated Pathology: Scleroderma (CREST)

Item 7 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-double-stranded-DNA antibodies (ANA antibodies) Associated Pathology: SLE (type III hypersensitivity)

Item 8 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-epithelial cell Associated Pathology: Pemphigus vulgaris

Item 9 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-gliadin antibodies Associated Pathology: Celiac disease

Item 10 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-histone Antibodies Associated Pathology: Drug-induced SLE (cf. SLE)

Item 11 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-IgM antibodies Associated Pathology: Rheumatoid arthritis

Item 12 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-mitochondrial antibodies Associated Pathology: Primary biliary cirrhosis

Item 13 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Anti-neutrophil antibodies Associated Pathology: Vasculitis

Item 14 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Antiplatelet antibodies Associated Pathology: Idiopathic thrombocytopenic purpura

Item 15 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Aortic aneurysm, abdominal & descending aorta Associated Pathology: Atherosclerosis

Item 16 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Aortic aneurysm, ascending Associated Pathology: Tertiary syphilis

Item 17 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Arachnodactyly Associated Pathology: Marfan's syndrome

Item 18 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Argyll-Robertson pupil Associated Pathology: Neurosyphilis

Item 19 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Aschoff bodies Associated Pathology: Rheumatic fever

Item 20 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Atrophy of the mamillary bodies Associated Pathology: Wernicke's encephalopathy

Item 21 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Auer rods Associated Pathology: Acute myelogenous leukemia (especially the promyelocytic type)

Item 22 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Autosplenectomy Associated Pathology: Sickle cell anemia

Item 23 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Babinski sign Associated Pathology: Upper motor neuron lesion

Item 24 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacteremia/pneumonia (IVDA) Associated Pathology: Staphylococcus aureus

Item 25 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacteria associated with cancer Associated Pathology: Helicobacter pylori

Item 26 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacteria found in GI tract Associated Pathology: Bacteroides (second most common is Escherichia coli)

Item 27 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacterial meningitis (adults) Associated Pathology: Neisseria meningitidis

Item 28 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacterial meningitis (elderly) Associated Pathology: Streptococcus pneumoniae

Item 29 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacterial meningitis (kids) Associated Pathology: Haemophilus influenza type B

Item 30 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bacterial meningitis (newborns) Associated Pathology: Escherichia coli

Item 31 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Baker's cyst in popliteal fossa Associated Pathology: Rheumatoid arthritis

Item 32 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bamboo spine' on xray Associated Pathology: Ankylosing spondylitis

Item 33 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Basophilic stippling of RBC's Associated Pathology: Lead poisoning

Item 34 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bence-Jones proteins Associated Pathology: Multiple myeloma (kappa or lambda Ig light chains in urine);Waldenstrom's macroglobinemia (IgM)

Item 35 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bilateral hilar adenopathy, uveitis Associated Pathology: Sarcoidosis

Item 36 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Birbeck granules on EM Associated Pathology: Histiocytosis X (eosinophilic granuloma)

Item 37 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bloody tap on LP Associated Pathology: Subarachnoid hemorrhage

Item 38 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Blue-domed cysts Associated Pathology: Fibrocystic change of the breast

Item 39 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Blue bloater Associated Pathology: Chronic bronchitis

Item 40 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Blue sclera Associated Pathology: Osteogenesis imperfecta

Item 41 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Boot-shaped heart on x-ray Associated Pathology: Tetralogy of Fallot; RV hypertrophy

Item 42 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bouchard's nodes Associated Pathology: Osteoarthritis (PIP swelling secondary to osteophytes)

Item 43 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Boutonniere's deformity Associated Pathology: Rheumatoid arthritis

Item 44 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Brain tumor - supratentorial (kids) Associated Pathology: Craniopharyngioma

Item 45 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Brain tumor (adults) Associated Pathology: Astrocytoma (including glioblastoma multiforme) > mets > meningioma > Schwannoma

Item 46 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: tumor (kids) Associated Pathology: Medullobastoma (cerebellum)

Item 47 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Branching rods in oral infection Associated Pathology: Actinomyces israelii

Item 48 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Breast cancer Associated Pathology: Infultrating ductal carcinoma (in the US, one in nine women will develop breast cancer)

Item 49 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Breast mass Associated Pathology: Fibrocystic change (in post-menopausal women, carcinoma is the most common)

Item 50 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Breast tumor (benign) Associated Pathology: Fibroadenoma

Item 51 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Brown tumor'of bone Associated Pathology: Hemorrhage causes brown color of osteolytic cysts: Hyperparathyroidism; Osteitis fibrosa cystica (von Recklinghausen's disease)

Item 52 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Brushfield's spots Associated Pathology: Down syndrome

Item 53 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bruton's lines Associated Pathology: Lead poisoning

Item 54 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Bug in debilitated, hospitalized pneumonia patient Associated Pathology: Klebsiella

Item 55 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: C-ANCA Associated Pathology: Weggener's granulomatosis

Item 56 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Café au lait spots on skin Associated Pathology: Neurofibromatosis

Item 57 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Calf pseudohypertrophy Associated Pathology: Duchenne's muscular dystrophy

Item 58 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Call-Exner bodies Associated Pathology: Granulosa/thecal cell tumor of the ovary

Item 59 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cancer associated with AIDS Associated Pathology: Kaposi's sarcoma

Item 60 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cardiac primary tumor (adults) Associated Pathology: Myxoma (4:1 left to right atrium; 'ball & valve')

Item 61 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cardiac primary tumor (kids) Associated Pathology: Rhabdomyoma

Item 62 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cardiac tumor (adults) Associated Pathology: Mets

Item 63 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cardiomegaly with apical atrophy Associated Pathology: Chagas' disease

Item 64 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cardiomyopathy Associated Pathology: Dilated cardiomyopathy

Item 65 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cerebriform nuclei Associated Pathology: Mycosis fungoides (cutaneous T-cell lymphoma)

Item 66 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chancre Associated Pathology: Primary syphilis (not painful)

Item 67 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chancroid Associated Pathology: Haemophilus ducreyi (painful)

Item 68 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Charcot's triad Associated Pathology: Multiple sclerosis (nystagmus, intention tremor,scanning speech); Cholangitis (jaundice, RUQ, fever)

Item 69 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Charcot-Leyden crystals Associated Pathology: Bronchial asthma (eosinophil membranes)

Item 70 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cherry-red spot on macula Associated Pathology: Tay-Sachs, Niemann-Pick disease, central retinal artery occlusion

Item 71 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chevostek's sign Associated Pathology: Hypocalcemia (facial muscle spasm upon tapping)

Item 72 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cheyne-Stokes respirations Associated Pathology: Central apnea in CHF & increased ICP

Item 73 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chocolate cysts Associated Pathology: Endometriosis (frequently involve both ovaries)

Item 74 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chromosomal disorder Associated Pathology: Down syndrome (associated with ALL, Alzheimer's dementia, & endocardial cushion defects)

Item 75 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chronic arrhythmia Associated Pathology: Atrial fibrillation (associated w/ high risk of emboli)

Item 76 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Chronic atrophic gastritis Associated Pathology: Predisposition to gastric carcinoma

Item 77 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Clue cells Associated Pathology: Gardnerella vaginitis

Item 78 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Codman's triangle on x-ray Associated Pathology: Osteoasarcoma

Item 79 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cold agglutinins Associated Pathology: Mycoplasma pneumoniae; Infectious mononeucleosis

Item 80 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cold intolerance Associated Pathology: Myxedema

Item 81 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Condyloma lata Associated Pathology: Secondary syphilis

Item 82 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Congenital adrenal hyperplasia Associated Pathology: 21-Hydroxylase deficiency

Item 83 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Congenital cardiac anomaly Associated Pathology: VSD

Item 84 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Constrictive pericarditis Associated Pathology: Tuberculosis

Item 85 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Continuous machinery murmur Associated Pathology: Patent ductus arteriosus

Item 86 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Coronary artery involved in thrombosis Associated Pathology: LAD > RCA > LCA

Item 87 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cotton wool spots Associated Pathology: Chronic hypertension

Item 88 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cough, conjunctivitis, coryza + fever Associated Pathology: Measles

Item 89 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Councilman bodies Associated Pathology: Toxic or viral hepatitis

Item 90 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cowdry type A bodies Associated Pathology: Herpes virus

Item 91 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Crescents in Bowman's capsule Associated Pathology: Rapidly progressive crescentic glomerulonephritis

Item 92 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cretinism Associated Pathology: Hypothyroidism/iodine deficit

Item 93 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Currant-jelly sputum Associated Pathology: Klebsiella

Item 94 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Curschmann's spirals Associated Pathology: Bronchial asthma (whorled mucous plugs)

Item 95 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cushing's syndrome Associated Pathology: Corticosteroid therapy (second most common cause is excess ACTH secretion by pituitary)

Item 96 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Cyanosis (early; less common) Associated Pathology: Tetralogy of Fallot, transposition of great vessels, truncus arteriosus

Item 97 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: D-dimers Associated Pathology: DIC

Item 98 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Death in CML Associated Pathology: Blast crisis

Item 99 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Death in SLE Associated Pathology: Lupus nephropathy

Item 100 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Dementia Associated Pathology: Alzheimer's (second most common is multi-infarct)

Item 101 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Demyelinating disease Associated Pathology: Multiple sclerosis

Item 102 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Depigmentation of neurons in substantia nigra Associated Pathology: Parkinson's disease (basal ganglia disorder -- rigidity, resting tremor, bradykinesia)

Item 103 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Dermatitis, dementia, diarrhea Associated Pathology: Pellagra (Niacin, vitamin B3 deficiency)

Item 104 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Diabetes insipidus + exopthalmos + lesions of skull Associated Pathology: Hand-Schuller-Christian disease

Item 105 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: DIC Associated Pathology: Gram-negative sepsis, obstetric complications, cancer, burns trauma

Item 106 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Dietary deficit Associated Pathology: Iron

Item 107 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Dog or cat bite Associated Pathology: Pasteurella multocida

Item 108 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Donovan bodies Associated Pathology: Granuloma inguinale

Item 109 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ejection click Associated Pathology: Aortic/pulmonic stenosis

Item 110 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Elastic skin Associated Pathology: Ehlers-Danlos syndrome

Item 111 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Epiglottitis Associated Pathology: Haemophilus influenza type B

Item 112 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Erythema chronicum migrans Associated Pathology: Lyme disease

Item 113 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Esophageal cancer Associated Pathology: Squamous cell carcinoma

Item 114 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Fat, female, forty, & fertile' Associated Pathology: Acute cholecystitis

Item 115 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Fatty liver Associated Pathology: Alcoholism

Item 116 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ferruginous bodies Associated Pathology: Asbestosis

Item 117 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Food poisoning Associated Pathology: Staphylococcus aureus

Item 118 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ghon complex Associated Pathology: Secondary TB

Item 119 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ghon focus Associated Pathology: Primary TB

Item 120 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Glomerularnephritis (adults) Associated Pathology: IgA nephropathy (Berger's disease)

Item 121 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Gower's maneuver Associated Pathology: Duchenne's (use of patient's arms to help legs pick self off the floor)

Item 122 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Group affected by cystic fibrosis Associated Pathology: Caucasians (fat-soluble vitamin deficiencies, mucous plugs/lung infections)

Item 123 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Gynecologic malignancy Associated Pathology: Endometrial carcinoma

Item 124 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hair on end' appearance on x-ray Associated Pathology: Beta-thalassemia

Item 125 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hampton's hump on x-ray Associated Pathology: Pulmonary embolism

Item 126 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: HbS Associated Pathology: Sickle cell anemia

Item 127 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: HCG elevated Associated Pathology: Choriocarcinoma; Hyadatidiform mole (occurs with & without embryo)

Item 128 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heart murmur Associated Pathology: Mitral valve prolapse

Item 129 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heart valve (rheumatic fever) Associated Pathology: Mitral valve (aotric is second)

Item 130 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heart valve in bacterial endocarditis Associated Pathology: Mitral

Item 131 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heart valve in bacterial endocarditis in IVDA Associated Pathology: Tricuspid

Item 132 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heberden's nodes Associated Pathology: Osteoarthritis (DIP swelling secondary to osteophytes)

Item 133 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heinz bodies Associated Pathology: G6PD deficiency

Item 134 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Helminth infection (US) Associated Pathology: Enterobius vermicularis (Ascaris lumbricoides is second most common)

Item 135 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hematoma - epidural Associated Pathology: Rupture of middle meningeal artery (arterial bleeding is fast)

Item 136 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hematoma - subdural Associated Pathology: Rupture of bridging veins (trauma; venous bleeding is slow)

Item 137 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hemochromocytosis Associated Pathology: Multiple blood transfusions (can result in CHF, and increases risk of hepatocellular carcinoma)

Item 138 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hepatic cirrhosis Associated Pathology: EtOH

Item 139 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hepatocellular carcinoma Associated Pathology: Cirrhotic liver (often associated with hepatitis B & C)

Item 140 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hereditary bleeding disorder Associated Pathology: Von Willebrand's

Item 141 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Heterophil antibodies Associated Pathology: Infectious mononucleosis (EBV)

Item 142 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hgb F Associated Pathology: Thalassemia major

Item 143 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: High output cardiac failure (dilated cardiomyopathy) Associated Pathology: Wet beriberi (thiamine, vitamin B1 deficiency)

Item 144 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: HLA-B27 Associated Pathology: Reiter's syndrome, ankylosing spondylitis

Item 145 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: HLA-DR3 or DR4 Associated Pathology: DM type 1 (caused by autoimmune destruction of beta cells)

Item 146 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Holosystolic murmur Associated Pathology: VSD, tricuspid regurgitation

Item 147 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Homer-Wright rosettes Associated Pathology: Neuroblastoma

Item 148 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Honeycomb lung on x-ray Associated Pathology: Interstitial fibrosis

Item 149 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Howell Jolly bodies Associated Pathology: Splenectomy (or non-functional spleen)

Item 150 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hyperphagia + hypersexuality + hyperorality + hyperdocile Associated Pathology: Kluver-Bucy syndrome (amygdala)

Item 151 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hyperpigmentation of skin Associated Pathology: Primary adrenal insufficiency (Addison's disease)

Item 152 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hypersegmented neutrophils Associated Pathology: Macrocytic anemia

Item 153 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hypertension + hypokalemia Associated Pathology: Cushing & Conn syndromes

Item 154 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hypertension, secondary Associated Pathology: Renal disease

Item 155 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hypochromic microcytosis Associated Pathology: Iron-deficiency anemia

Item 156 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hypoparathyroidism Associated Pathology: Thyroidectomy

Item 157 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Hypopituitarism Associated Pathology: Adenoma

Item 158 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Increase alpha-fetoprotein in amniotic fluid/maternal serum Associated Pathology: Anencephaly; Spina bifida

Item 159 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Increased uric acid levels Associated Pathology: Gout; Lesch-Nyhan; Myeloproliferative disorders; Loop & thiazide diuretics

Item 160 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Infection in blood transfusion Associated Pathology: Hepatitis C

Item 161 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Infection in burn victims Associated Pathology: Klebsiella

Item 162 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Intussesception Associated Pathology: Adenovirus (cause hyperplasia of Peyer's patches)

Item 163 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Janeway lesions Associated Pathology: Endocarditis

Item 164 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Jarisch-Herxheimer reaction Associated Pathology: Syphilis; over-aggressive treatment of an symptomatic patient that causes symptoms due to rapid lysis

Item 165 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Kaposi's sarcoma Associated Pathology: Homosexual AIDS patients (not associated with IVDA acquired HIV/AIDS)

Item 166 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Kayser-Fleischer rings Associated Pathology: Wilson's disease

Item 167 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Keratin pearls Associated Pathology: Squamous cell carcinoma

Item 168 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Kidney stones Associated Pathology: Calcium = radiopaque (2nd most common is ammonium = radiolucent; formed by urease positive organisms like Proteus vulgaris or Staphylococcus)

Item 169 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Kimmelstiel-Wilson nodules Associated Pathology: Diabetic nephropathy

Item 170 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Koilocytes Associated Pathology: HPV

Item 171 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Koplik spots Associated Pathology: Measles

Item 172 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Kussmaul hyperpnea Associated Pathology: Diabetic ketoacidosis

Item 173 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lens dislocation + aortic dissection + joint hyperflexibility Associated Pathology: Marfan's disease (fibrillin deficit)

Item 174 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Leukemia (adults) Associated Pathology: AML

Item 175 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lewy bodies Associated Pathology: Parkinson's disease

Item 176 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lines of Zahn Associated Pathology: Arterial thrombus

Item 177 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lisch nodules Associated Pathology: Neurofibromatosis (von Recklinghausen's disease)

Item 178 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Liver disease Associated Pathology: Alcoholic liver disease

Item 179 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Location of brain tumors (adults) Associated Pathology: Supratentorial

Item 180 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Location of brain tumors (kids) Associated Pathology: Infratentorial

Item 181 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Low serum ceruloplasmin Associated Pathology: Wilson's disease

Item 182 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lucid interval Associated Pathology: Epidural hematoma

Item 183 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lumpy Bumpy' appearance of glomeruli on immunoflourescence Associated Pathology: Poststreptococal glomerulonephritis

Item 184 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lysosomal storage disease disorder Associated Pathology: Gaucher's

Item 185 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Lytic bone lesions on x-ray Associated Pathology: Multiple myeloma

Item 186 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Machine-like' murmur Associated Pathology: PDA

Item 187 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Male cancer Associated Pathology: Prostatic carcinoma

Item 188 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Malignancy associated with infectious fever Associated Pathology: Hodgkin's

Item 189 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Malignant skin tumor Associated Pathology: Basal cell carcinoma (rarely metastasizes)

Item 190 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Mallory bodies Associated Pathology: Alcoholic liver disease

Item 191 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: McBurney's sign Associated Pathology: Appendicitis

Item 192 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Mental retardation Associated Pathology: Down syndrome (Fragile X is the second most common cause)

Item 193 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Mets to bone Associated Pathology: Breast, lung, thyroid, testes, prostate

Item 194 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Mets to brain Associated Pathology: Lung, breast, skin (melanoma), kidney (renal cell carcinoma), GI

Item 195 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Mets to liver Associated Pathology: Colon, gastric, pancreatic, breast, & lung carcinomas

Item 196 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: MI Associated Pathology: Atherosclerosis

Item 197 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Mitral valve stenosis Associated Pathology: Rheumatic heart disease

Item 198 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: MLF syndrome (INO) Associated Pathology: Multiple sclerosis

Item 199 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Monoclonal antibody-spike Associated Pathology: Multiple myeloma (called the M protein; usually IgG or IgA); MGUG; Waldenstrom's (M Protein = IgM) macroglobulinemia

Item 200 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Motor neuron disease Associated Pathology: ALS

Item 201 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Myocarditis Associated Pathology: Coxsackie B

Item 202 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Myxedema Associated Pathology: Hypothyroidism

Item 203 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Necrotizing vasculitis (lungs) & necrotizing glomerulitis Associated Pathology: Wegener's & Goodpasture's (hemoptysis & glomerular disease)

Item 204 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Needle-shaped, negatively bifringent crystals Associated Pathology: Gout

Item 205 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Negri bodies Associated Pathology: Rabies

Item 206 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Neoplasm (kids) Associated Pathology: ALL (2nd most common is cerebellar medulloblastoma)

Item 207 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Nephritis + cataracts + hearing loss Associated Pathology: Alport syndrome

Item 208 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Nephrotic syndome (kids) Associated Pathology: Minimal change disease (associated with infections/vaccinations; treat with corticosteroids)

Item 209 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Nephrotic syndrome Associated Pathology: Membranous glomerulonephritis

Item 210 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Nephrotic syndrome (adults) Associated Pathology: Membranous glomerulonephritis

Item 211 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Neurofibrillary tangles Associated Pathology: Alzheimer disease

Item 212 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: No lactation postpartum Associated Pathology: Sheehan's syndrome

Item 213 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Nutmeg liver Associated Pathology: Congestive heart failure

Item 214 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Obstruction of male urinary tract Associated Pathology: BPH

Item 215 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Occupational exposure to asbestos Associated Pathology: Malignant mesothelioma

Item 216 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Oncogene involved in cancer Associated Pathology: p53 Suppressor

Item 217 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Opening snap Associated Pathology: Mitral stenosis

Item 218 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Opportunistic infection in AIDS Associated Pathology: PCP

Item 219 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Organ receiving mets Associated Pathology: Adrenal glands (due to rich blood supply)

Item 220 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Organ sending mets Associated Pathology: Lung > breast, stomach

Item 221 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Orphan Annie cells Associated Pathology: Papillary carcinoma of the ovary

Item 222 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Osler's nodes Associated Pathology: Endocarditis

Item 223 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Osteomyelitis Associated Pathology: Staphylococcus aureus

Item 224 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Osteomyelitis in patients with sickle cell disease Associated Pathology: Salmonella

Item 225 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Osteomyelitis with IVDA Associated Pathology: Pseudomonas

Item 226 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ovarian tumor (benign) Associated Pathology: Hamartoma

Item 227 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ovarian tumor (malignant) Associated Pathology: Serous cystadenoma

Item 228 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Owl's eye Associated Pathology: CMV

Item 229 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: P-ANCA Associated Pathology: Polyarteritis nodosa

Item 230 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Painless jaundice Associated Pathology: Pancreatic cancer (head)

Item 231 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Palpable purpura on legs & buttocks Associated Pathology: Henoch-Schonlein purpura

Item 232 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pancreatic tumor Associated Pathology: Adenocarcinoma (head of pancreas)

Item 233 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pancreatitus (acute) Associated Pathology: EtOH and gallstones

Item 234 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pancreatitus (chronic) Associated Pathology: EtOH (adults), cystic fibrosis (kids)

Item 235 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pannus Associated Pathology: Rheumatiod arthritis

Item 236 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Patient with ALL/CLL/AML/CML Associated Pathology: ALL - Child / CLL - Adult over 60 / AML - Adult over 60 / CML - Adult 35-50

Item 237 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Patient with Hodgkin's Associated Pathology: Young male (except nodular sclerosis type - female)

Item 238 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Patient with minimal change disease Associated Pathology: Young child

Item 239 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Patient with Reiter's Associated Pathology: Male

Item 240 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Peau d'orange Associated Pathology: Carcinoma of the breast

Item 241 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pelvic inflammatory disease Associated Pathology: Neisseria gonorrhoeae (monoarticular arthritis)

Item 242 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Periosteal elevation on x-ray Associated Pathology: Pyogenic osteomyelitis

Item 243 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Philadelphia chromosome (bcr;abl) Associated Pathology: CML (may sometimes be associated with AML)

Item 244 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pick bodies Associated Pathology: Pick's disease

Item 245 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pink puffer' Associated Pathology: Emphysema (centroacinar (smoking), panacinar (alpha1-antitrypsin deficiency))

Item 246 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pituitary tumor Associated Pathology: Prolactinoma (2nd - somatotropic 'acidophilic' adenoma)

Item 247 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pneumonia, hospital-acquired Associated Pathology: Klebsiella

Item 248 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pneumonia, in CF, burn infection Associated Pathology: Pseudomonas aeruginosa

Item 249 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Podagra Associated Pathology: Gout (MP joint of hallux)

Item 250 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Podocyte fusion Associated Pathology: Minimal change disease

Item 251 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Polyneuropathy preceded by GI or respiratory infection Associated Pathology: Guillian-Barre syndrome

Item 252 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Polyneuropathy, cardiac pathology, & edema Associated Pathology: Dry beriberi (thiamine, vitamine B1 deficiency)

Item 253 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Port-wine stain Associated Pathology: Hemangioma

Item 254 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Posterior anterior 'drawer sign' Associated Pathology: Anterior cruciate ligament injury

Item 255 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Preventable blindness Associated Pathology: Chlamydia

Item 256 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Preventable cancer Associated Pathology: Lung cancer

Item 257 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Primary amenorrhea Associated Pathology: Turner's (XO)

Item 258 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Primary bone tumor (adults) Associated Pathology: Multiple myeloma

Item 259 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Primary hyperaldosteronism Associated Pathology: Adenoma of adrenal cortex

Item 260 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Primary hyperparathyroidism Associated Pathology: Adenomas (followed by: hyperplasia, then carcinoma)

Item 261 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Primary hyperparathyroidism Associated Pathology: Adenoma

Item 262 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Primary liver tumor Associated Pathology: Hepatoma

Item 263 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Psammoma bodies Associated Pathology: Caused by apoptosis of tumor cells with dystrophic calcification & found in: Papillary adenocarcinoma of the thyroid (most common cancer of the thyroid); Serous papillary cystadenocarcinoma of the

Item 264 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pseudopalisade tumor cell arrangement Associated Pathology: Glioblastoma multiforme

Item 265 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pseudorosettes Associated Pathology: Ewing's sarcoma

Item 266 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Ptosis, miosis, anhidrosis Associated Pathology: Horner's syndrome (Pancoast's tumor)

Item 267 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pulmonary hypertension Associated Pathology: COPD

Item 268 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Pus, empyema, abscess Associated Pathology: Staphylococcus aureus

Item 269 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Rash on palms & soles Associated Pathology: Secondary syphilis; Rocky Mountain Spotted Fever

Item 270 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: RBC's in urine Associated Pathology: Bladder carcinoma

Item 271 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: RBC casts in urine Associated Pathology: Acute glomerulonephritis

Item 272 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Recurrent pulmonary Pseudomonas and Staphylococcus aureus infections Associated Pathology: Cystic fibrosis

Item 273 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Red urine in the morning Associated Pathology: Paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria

Item 274 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Reed-Sternberg cells Associated Pathology: Hodgkin's lymphoma

Item 275 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Reid index (increased) Associated Pathology: Chronic bronchitis

Item 276 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Reinke crystals Associated Pathology: Leydig cell tumor

Item 277 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Renal cell carcinoma + cavernous hemangiomas + adenomas Associated Pathology: Von Hippel - Lindau disease

Item 278 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Renal epithelial casts in urine Associated Pathology: Acute toxic/viral nephrosis

Item 279 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Renal tumor Associated Pathology: Renal cell carcinoma - associated with von Hippel-Lindau & acquired polycystic kidney disease; paraneoplastic syndromes (erythropoietin, renin, PTH, ACTH)

Item 280 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Rhomboid crystals, positively bifringent Associated Pathology: Pseudogout

Item 281 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Rib notching Associated Pathology: Coarctation of aorta

Item 282 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Right-sided heart faulure Associated Pathology: Left-sided heart failure

Item 283 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Right heart failure due to a pulmonary cause Associated Pathology: Cor pulmonale

Item 284 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Roth spots in retina Associated Pathology: Endocarditis

Item 285 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Rouleaux formation (RBC's) Associated Pathology: Multiple myeloma

Item 286 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Russell bodies Associated Pathology: Multiple myeloma

Item 287 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: S3 Associated Pathology: Left to right shunt (VSD, PDA, ASD); Mitral regurgitation; LV failure (CHF)

Item 288 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: S4 Associated Pathology: Aortic stenosis, hypertrophic subaortic stenosis

Item 289 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Schiller-Duval bodies Associated Pathology: Yolk sac tumor

Item 290 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Schwarzman reaction Associated Pathology: Neisseria meningitidis

Item 291 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Secondary hyperparathyroidism Associated Pathology: Hypocalcemia of chronic renal failure

Item 292 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Senile plaques Associated Pathology: Alzheimer's disease

Item 293 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Sexually transmitted disease Associated Pathology: Chlamydia

Item 294 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Sheehan's syndrome Associated Pathology: Postpartum pituitary infarction

Item 295 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: SIADH Associated Pathology: Small cell carcinoma of the lung

Item 296 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Signet ring cells Associated Pathology: Gastric carcinoma

Item 297 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Simian crease Associated Pathology: Down syndrome

Item 298 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Site of diverticula Associated Pathology: Sigmoid colon

Item 299 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Site of metastasis Associated Pathology: Regional lymph nodes

Item 300 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Site of metastasis (2nd most commond) Associated Pathology: Liver

Item 301 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Sites of atherosclerosis Associated Pathology: Abdominal aorta > coronary > popliteal > carotid

Item 302 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Skin cancer Associated Pathology: Basal cell carcinoma

Item 303 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Skip lesions Associated Pathology: Crohn's

Item 304 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Slapped cheeks Associated Pathology: Erythema infectiosum (fifth disease)'

Item 305 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Smith antigen Associated Pathology: SLE

Item 306 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Smudge' cell Associated Pathology: CLL

Item 307 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Soap bubble on x-ray Associated Pathology: Giant cell tumor or bone

Item 308 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Spike & dome on EM Associated Pathology: Membranous glomerulonephritis

Item 309 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Splinter hemorrhages in fingernails Associated Pathology: Endocarditis

Item 310 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Starry-sky pattern Associated Pathology: Burkitt's lymphoma

Item 311 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Stomach cancer Associated Pathology: Adenocarcinoma

Item 312 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Strawberry tongue' Associated Pathology: Scarlet fever

Item 313 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Streaky ovaries Associated Pathology: Turner's syndrome

Item 314 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: String sign on x-ray Associated Pathology: Crohn's disease

Item 315 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Subepithelial humps on EM Associated Pathology: Poststreptococal glomerulonephritis

Item 316 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Suboccipital lymphadenopathy Associated Pathology: Rubella

Item 317 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Sulfur granules Associated Pathology: Actinomyces israelii

Item 318 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Surgical wound Associated Pathology: Staphylococcus aureus

Item 319 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Swollen gums, bruising, poor wound healing, anemia Associated Pathology: Scurvy (ascorbic acid, vitamin C deficiency) - vitamin C is necessary for hydroxylation of proline & lysine in collagen synthesis

Item 320 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Systolic ejection murmur (crescendo-decrescendo) Associated Pathology: Aortic valve stenosis

Item 321 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: t(14; 18) Associated Pathology: Follicular lymphomas (bcl-2 activation)

Item 322 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: t(8;14) Associated Pathology: Burkitt's lymphoma (c-myc activation)

Item 323 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: t(9;22) Associated Pathology: Philadelphia chromosome, CML (bcr-abl hybrid)

Item 324 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tabes dorsalis Associated Pathology: Tertiary syphilis

Item 325 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Target cells Associated Pathology: Thalassemia

Item 326 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tendon xanthomas (classically Achilles) Associated Pathology: Familial hypercholesterolemia

Item 327 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Testicular tumor Associated Pathology: Seminoma

Item 328 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Thumb sign on lateral x-ray Associated Pathology: Epiglottitis

Item 329 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Thymoma Associated Pathology: Myasthenia gravis (present in 20% of those with MG)

Item 330 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Thyroid cancer Associated Pathology: Papillary carcinoma

Item 331 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Thyroidization of kidney Associated Pathology: Chronic bacterial pyelonephritis

Item 332 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tophi Associated Pathology: Gout

Item 333 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tracheoesophageal fistula Associated Pathology: Lower esophagus joins trachea/upper esophagus - blind pouch

Item 334 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tram-track appearance on LM Associated Pathology: Membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis

Item 335 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Traumatic open wound Associated Pathology: Clostridium perfringens

Item 336 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Trousseau's sign Associated Pathology: Visceral cancer; pancreatic adeneocarcinoma (migratory thrombophlebitis); Hypocalcemia (carpal spasm)

Item 337 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tumor in men Associated Pathology: Prostate carcinoma

Item 338 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tumor in women Associated Pathology: Leiomyoma (estrogen dependent)

Item 339 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tumor of infancy Associated Pathology: Hemangioma

Item 340 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tumor of the adrenal medulla (adults) Associated Pathology: Pheochromocytoma (benign)

Item 341 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Tumor of the adrenal medulla (kids) Associated Pathology: Neuroblastoma (malignant)

Item 342 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Type of Hodgkin's Associated Pathology: Mixed cellularity (versus: lymphocytic predominance, lymphocytic depletion, nodular sclerosis)

Item 343 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Type of non-Hodgkin's Associated Pathology: Follicular, small cleaved

Item 344 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Type of pituitary adenoma Associated Pathology: Prolactinoma

Item 345 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: UTI Associated Pathology: Escherichia coli

Item 346 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: UTI (young women) Associated Pathology: Staphylococcus saprophyticus

Item 347 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Vasculitis Associated Pathology: Temporal arteritis (risk of ipsilateral blindness due to thrombosis of ophthalmic artery)

Item 348 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Viral encephalitis Associated Pathology: HSV

Item 349 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Virchow's node Associated Pathology: Left supraclavicular node enlargement from metastatic carcinoma of the stomach

Item 350 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Virchow's triad Associated Pathology: Pulmonary embolism (triad = blood stasis, endothelial damage, hypercoag.)

Item 351 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Vitamin deficiency (US) Associated Pathology: Folic acid (pregnant women are at high risk; body stores only 3-4 month supply)

Item 352 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Waxy casts Associated Pathology: Chronic end-stage renal disease

Item 353 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: WBC's in urine Associated Pathology: Acute cystitis

Item 354 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: WBC casts in urine Associated Pathology: Acute pyelonephritis

Item 355 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Wire loop' appearance on LM Associated Pathology: Lupus nephropathy

Item 356 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Worst headache of my life' Associated Pathology: Berry aneurysm - associated with adult polycystic kidney disease

Item 357 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Xanthochromia (CSF) Associated Pathology: Subacrachnoid hemorrhage

Item 358 : Rapid Recall - First Aid
Clinical Finding: Xerostomia + arthritis + keratoconjunctivitis sicca Associated Pathology: Sjogren's syndrome
